_comment: Golden-template Project field schema (gh-projects, Phase 1). Hand-built once on the golden-template Project (Phase 0), then replicated to every scaffolded project via copyProjectV2. scaffold-repo uses this as the EXPECTED schema to diff the COPY against (AC-7) — it never re-PUTs an option list or iterationConfiguration without a prior diff (AC-30). Every signal single-select carries an option `description` documenting its derivation. Org Issue Fields (Priority/Start date/Target date) and Issue Types (Type) live OUTSIDE the project copy (see fields with home != project) and are ensured by scaffold against the org.

options.name: Ready
options.description: AC-complete and gated by the lead; pull from here.

options.name: In Progress
options.description: A linked branch has been pushed; WIP.

options.name: In Review
options.description: A non-draft PR is open against the issue.

options.name: On Staging
options.description: Merged to main and deployed to staging; item stays open.

options.name: Done
options.description: Deployed to prod; closed by board-status, Release cut.

fields.name: Type
fields.purpose: Work taxonomy (org-wide Issue Type, not a project field)

options.name: Chore
options.description: Maintenance / housekeeping with no user-facing change.

options.name: Epic
options.description: A parent that splits into per-AC-group sub-issues.

fields.name: Size
fields.purpose: S/M/L appetite (not points); suggested from AC-group count

options.name: L
options.description: 4+ AC groups; large appetite (recommends an Epic split).

fields.name: Tier
fields.purpose: Drives write-spec rigor (T1->light, T2->standard, T3->full+refine); T3 requires a linked deep spec

options.name: T1
options.description: Trivial; light rigor; AC table only.

options.name: T2
options.description: Standard; standard rigor; TL;DR + AC + boundaries.

options.name: T3
options.description: Complex; full rigor + refine-spec; linked deep spec required.

fields.name: Parent issue
fields.purpose: Epic grouping; feeds the sub-issue % rollup

fields.name: Spec
fields.purpose: Link to T3 deep spec; empty for T1/T2

fields.name: Blocked
fields.purpose: yes/no flag-state derived from native dependencies, not hand-set

options.name: yes
options.description: At least one open blocked-by dependency (derived by lib/dag from native blocked-by edges).

fields.name: Priority
fields.purpose: P0-P3; orders Ready (org Issue Field, surfaced as a project column on private projects)

fields.name: Target date
fields.purpose: Roadmap target / deadline; feeds Schedule health & Slippage (org Issue Field)

options.name: On track
options.description: Not past Target and not blocking a release.

options.name: At risk
options.description: Target within the warning window or a soft slip.

options.name: Blocked
options.description: An open blocked-by dependency holds it.

options.name: Overdue
options.description: Past Target date and still open.

fields.name: Slippage-days
fields.purpose: Days past Target (unlocks Insights sum/avg, numeric sort/range)

fields.name: Blast radius
fields.purpose: How much this item blocks downstream

options.name: Blocks many
options.description: Blocks two or more downstream items.

options.name: Blocks release
options.description: On the critical path to a release milestone.

options.name: Release blocker
options.description: A release cannot ship without it.

options.name: Reduce scope
options.description: Cut scope to hold the date.
